title: InfiniteDrift's Cozy Modlist
description: InfiniteDrift's modded playthrough modpack, all updated for 1.20
body:
This is the modpack used by InfiniteDrift on Youtube, all together in one place for someone looking to emulate her playthrough. Beautify your world, decorate your house with hundreds of blocks, and try to eat a balanced diet with all the Farmer's Delight mods.

This is a lighter modpack expected to use 6-8GB of ram. Please let me know if you have any issues!

A slightly heavier and customized version is available for Fabric, just look up Nature's Comforts on Modrinth.

For questions, bug reporting, and news on this pack, please join my discord and choose the modpack role: [https://discord.gg/fQTEMqtVsn](https://discord.gg/fQTEMqtVsn)
